response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: For the first song, 'Orchestra' by BiSH, the vocals matched the reference lyrics perfectly. For the second song, 'JANE DOE' by Kenshi Yonezu, no lyrics were provided in the JSON, requiring 100% manual transcription which was executed accurately.
2. JSON Usage: The JSON was fully utilized for the first segment, and the talk segment as well as the second song were manually transcribed.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were adjusted strictly to vocal activation to prevent any cascading delays, especially during rapid conversation segments between the VTubers. No closed captioning tags were used.

subtitles.original: 忘れはしないよ
subtitles.english: I won't forget...

subtitles.original: あんなにも近くにいたはずが
subtitles.english: ...how close we were supposed to be,

subtitles.original: 今では繋がりなんて
subtitles.english: but now, our only connection...

subtitles.original: この空だけ
subtitles.english: ...is this sky.

subtitles.original: Wow oh
subtitles.english: Wow oh

subtitles.original: Wow oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Wow oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, go!

subtitles.original: リオナ、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Riona, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！なんとFlow Glowのみんなが来てくれました！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Everyone from Flow Glow actually came! Thank you!

subtitles.original: やったー！おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Yay! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: はい、ついにね、初めての生誕ライブで。そしてFlow Glowでね、こうやってライブできて、すごく嬉しいよ！
subtitles.english: Yes, finally, my first birthday live. And performing like this with Flow Glow, I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 呼んでくれてありがとう！おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for inviting us! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: エモかったね。めっちゃエモかった！
subtitles.english: That was so emotional. Super emotional!

subtitles.original: どうですか？エモかったですか？
subtitles.english: What do you think? Was it emotional?

subtitles.original: 泣いちゃったよ、リオナちゃん。泣いちゃった、泣いちゃった。
subtitles.english: I almost cried, Riona-chan. I really did!

subtitles.original: みんなでこうやってね、まぁ、みんなの誕生日ライブがあるかどうか、まぁ分かんないんだけど...
subtitles.english: Doing this together... well, I don't know if everyone will get a birthday live...

subtitles.original: え、どうだろ？Flow Glowになってまだ2ヶ月しか経ってないの！
subtitles.english: I wonder? It's only been two months since Flow Glow started!

subtitles.original: うちらも察してよ！リーダー、出させてくれて本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Think about us too! Leader, thank you so much for letting us perform!

subtitles.original: いやいや、一応リーダーとしてね、お仕事しておきました！
subtitles.english: No, no, as the leader, I had to do my job!

subtitles.original: ということで、今日は誕生日プレゼントに、みんなからの超絶可愛い『おめでとう、リオナおめでとう！』っていうプレゼントが欲しいんだけど、いいかな？
subtitles.english: So, as a birthday gift today, I'd like a super-cute 'Happy birthday, Riona!' from everyone as a present, would that be okay?

subtitles.original: いいですよ！誕生日ですしね！もちろん！
subtitles.english: Sure! It is your birthday after all! Of course!

subtitles.original: プレゼントもらっていいですか？おめでとう！みたいなやつ。
subtitles.english: Can I have my present? A 'Happy birthday!' kind of thing.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、『せーの』って言ったら、『リオナ、おめでとう』って言ってね。オッケー？プレゼントね、プレゼント。
subtitles.english: So, when I say 'ready, go,' please say 'Riona, happy birthday.' Okay? This is my present, okay?

subtitles.original: プレゼントならしょうがないな。ちゃんと可愛くやれよ！可愛くね！
subtitles.english: If it's a present, we have no choice. Do it properly and cutely! Cutely, okay!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, go!

subtitles.original: リオナー！！！
subtitles.english: Rionaaa!!!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って！もっと可愛い声で！何それ！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! Use a cuter voice! What was that?!

subtitles.original: じゃあ見本見せてよ、見本！
subtitles.english: Then show us an example!

subtitles.original: 初めての生誕祭なんだから、愛の言葉的なさ...セクシーで可愛くて愛。
subtitles.english: It's your first birthday festival, so how about some words of love... sexy, cute, and full of love.

subtitles.original: オッケー、行きますよ。リオナからの愛の言葉。3、2、1、はい！
subtitles.english: Okay, here I go. Words of love from Riona. 3, 2, 1, go!

subtitles.original: 今年も、来年も、再来年も、あなたに祝ってもらえますように。
subtitles.english: This year, next year, and the year after... I hope you'll always be there to celebrate with me.

subtitles.original: キャーーー！すごーーい！可愛い！
subtitles.english: Kyaaa! Amazing! So cute!

subtitles.original: あなたは、お残りです。
subtitles.english: You're staying behind.

subtitles.original: まるで この世界で
subtitles.english: It's as if in this world...

subtitles.original: 二人きりみたいだね
subtitles.english: ...we are the only two here.

subtitles.original: だって 少しだけ
subtitles.english: Because, just a little...

subtitles.original: 夢を見てしまっただけ
subtitles.english: ...I ended up dreaming.

subtitles.original: 爪先に 月明かり
subtitles.english: Moonlight on my toes,

subtitles.original: 花束の香りに
subtitles.english: the scent of a bouquet...

subtitles.original: 指に触れる憂い
subtitles.english: ...and sorrow touching my fingers.

subtitles.original: さよなら もう行かなきゃ
subtitles.english: Goodbye, I must go now,

subtitles.original: 何もかも忘れて
subtitles.english: forgetting everything.

subtitles.original: ガラスの上を 裸足のまま歩く
subtitles.english: Walking barefoot on glass,

subtitles.original: 痛む毎に 血が流れて落ちていく
subtitles.english: with every painful step, blood flows and drips away.

subtitles.original: お願い その赤い 足跡を辿って
subtitles.english: Please, follow those red footprints...

subtitles.original: 会いに来て
subtitles.english: ...and come to meet me.

subtitles.original: 錆びたプールに 放たれていく金魚
subtitles.english: Goldfish released into a rusty pool.

subtitles.original: 言葉を喉の奥 隠した林檎
subtitles.english: An apple that hid words deep in its throat.

subtitles.original: しなびた君の肌に 残る傷は遠く
subtitles.english: The scars remaining on your withered skin are far away.
